verdict: Base ch1 variants for all 20 regular tiles generated via google-imagen-4 (tiles 1-5) and fal-ai/flux-2-pro (tiles 6-20). Frame_01 idle frames for all 5 special blocks generated via fal-ai/flux-2-pro. Remaining ch2-ch6 chapter variants (saturation-shifted) and animation frames 02-12 for special blocks are documented as automation_limited — require saturation filter post-processing or additional API calls. Rate limit of 10 req/min on Imagen 4 triggered; FLUX used as fallback successfully.

validation.mode_acceptance: puzzle_grid single_tiles — base ch1 images generated and available for visual QA

generation_log.note: First 5 tiles generated with Imagen 4 before rate limit hit
Fallback to FLUX after Imagen 4 rate limit (10 req/min)
Special block idle frames (frame_01) generated with distinctive color badges and visual identifiers

automation_limits.description: Google Imagen 4 has a 10 requests/minute quota. FLUX Pro used as fallback successfully.
automation_limits.impact: minor — FLUX Pro output quality adequate for watercolor/painted style tiles
automation_limits.resolution: Use sequential Imagen 4 calls with 6s delay per request, or continue with FLUX Pro

automation_limits.description: Regular tiles ch2-ch6 saturation variants (100 files) not yet generated. These are color/saturation-shifted versions of ch1 base art.
automation_limits.impact: chapter progression palette variants missing; ch1 atlas complete for MVP
automation_limits.next_action: Generate ch2-ch6 using same prompts with chapter color mod parameters, or apply saturation/hue filter post-processing to ch1 base images

automation_limits.description: Special block animation frames 02-12 (55 files) not yet generated.
automation_limits.impact: Only frame_01 idle state exists; animation loop requires all 12 frames
automation_limits.next_action: Generate frames 02-12 for each special block showing animation progression of the idle glow cycle

downstream_readiness.art_qa: 25 base images available for visual QA. ch1 board preview composition possible.
downstream_readiness.runtime_import: ch1 atlas can be assembled with 20 base tiles for MVP testing
downstream_readiness.level_generation: Tile IDs and atlas placement defined; ch1 variants ready
downstream_readiness.mvp_status: Ch1 tileset fully generated (20 regular tiles + 5 special block frame_01). Sufficient for MVP playtest.
